title: alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. tetragonolobus
intro: Alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. tetragonolobus, commonly known as horse gram, is a legume plant native to tropical regions of the world. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and manage blood sugar levels. The plant is rich in protein, fiber, and nutrients, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in weight management. Alysicarpus tetragonolobus var. tetragonolobus can be prepared as herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is often consumed as a supplement or added to food products.
